calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day in Dept 218.
Judge Pro Tem Farley Tolpen, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack. Reporter: Rhonda Fung #4819
Appearances:
John Zanghi, Esq., for Plaintiff Conard House, Inc.
Eliah Bornstein, property manager for Plaintiff.
David Wilson, Defendant in Pro Per.
Parties met in Dept. 303A with Judge Pro Tem Farley Tolpen. Case settled. Parties entered into Stipulation for Entry of Judgment for restitution and possession of the premises located at 150 - 90th St., #118, San Francisco, CA. Rental agreement is forfeited. Back rent and damages in the amount of $1,211.00 and costs owed. Execution of the Writ is STAYED thru FEB-01-2004, 5:00PM; Defendant agrees to vacate premises on or before this date and time, leaving the premises free of occupants, personal possessions and debris. Any remaining property shall be deemed abandoned. If Defendant complies, Plaintiff waives back rent and damages from Oct. 15, 2003 thru Feb. 1. 2004, and Plaintiff will not enter Judgment until JAN-15-2004. Defendant waives rignt to the security deposit and releases right to claims under Civil Code 1542. Defendant shall not sub-let premises and agrees to comply with House Rules. Each side to bear their costs and attorney fees. If Defendant complies, Plaintiff will vacate Judgment and file a dismissal with prejudice. This settlement agreed to by all parties in open court. The DEC-15-2004 trial date is vacated.
